services_supported: Free estimates for new door installations
emergency_definition: Broken torsion spring with a car trapped
Security risk with the door off the tracks or jammed halfway open

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Send critical SMS with 'EMERGENCY' and customer address to Jake's cell, CC Lisa

non_emergency_routing_rules.action: Clara handles all inbound calls from 5:00 PM to 8:00 AM

call_transfer_rules.on_fail: Forward call to Clara after Lisa does not answer after three rings

integration_constraints: Integration with Jobber; Clara creates new client records if not existing and books appointments via Jobber calendar
after_hours_flow_summary: Clara handles 100% of inbound calls after hours (5 PM–8 AM) and routes emergencies to Jake's cell with SMS fallback
office_hours_flow_summary: During business hours, Clara live-transfers emergency calls to Jake's cell phone based on on-call rotation; if unanswered, sends critical SMS to Jake and CC Lisa
questions_or_unknowns: Phone numbers for Jake and Lisa not provided
Email addresses for notifications not provided
notes: Owners Jake and Lisa are on-call; Lisa will receive Clara Dashboard link to monitor calls
